full_text:
Liang Ji (Bozhuo) 梁冀 (伯卓)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Ji (梁冀), styledBozhuo (伯卓). Dominated the Han government in the 150s. Overthrown by Emperor Huan. Liang Ji was an historic figure affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liang Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
